title: PPF rules explained: Why your investment may stay locked in for more than 15 years

title: Consent-driven credit: Why consumer-controlled data is shaping the future of lending

title: Bulls fight back! Sensex recoups 400-point loss, Nifty back above 24,200
summary: Indian equity benchmarks, Sensex and Nifty, closed higher on Thursday, recovering from intraday losses. Hopes of a US-Iran peace deal eased oil prices, boosting risk appetite and lifting major indices. While some sectors declined, Nifty Metal showed strong gains, and broader markets remained firm.
